chunks.title: Lament and Confession of Sin
chunks.reason: A unified plea for God's intervention followed by a confession of universal sinfulness.

chunks.title: Prayer for Mercy and Relationship
chunks.reason: A shift to acknowledging God as Father and requesting mercy based on their covenant relationship.

chunks.title: Description of Desolation and Final Plea
chunks.reason: A description of the ruined holy places concluding with a rhetorical question about God's silence.
